title: SL:R And Epic fight compat
description:
Epic fight compatability for Solo Leveling: Reawakening mod

How to install: saves/your_world/datapacks
body:
# This datapack was created for compatability between [Epic fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) and [Solo Craft Reawakening](https://modrinth.com/mod/solo-craft-reawakening)

## It adds missing animations in daggers, katanas.
# I suggest to use [Solo Leveling: Arsenal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/solo-leveling-arsenal) for 3D models of weapons
## How to install: saves/your_world/datapacks
## Transfered to [Curseforge datapack link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/sl-r-epic-fight-compat-datapack) 
##  Quick fix to see daily quest anims:
1. Press esc - Mods
2. Type in searchbar: Epic fight
3. Press "config"
4. And click on "Graphics"
5. Filter Animation: On

## Quick fix for first person
1. Press esc - Mods
2. Type in searchbar: Epic fight
3. Press "config"
4. And click on "Graphics"
5. First person model: OFF
   
## Rebind Epic fight combat to another button - like f4. And you still can use SLR skills on button "R"
## Before asking what's wrong
1. Type: /datapack list
2. If you dont see datapack, then check "how to install"
3. Rejoin the world and check
## For epic fight only - use version that presented on this page
## For better anims on some weapons - use an addon version (under review)
